subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, the Ever-Abiding, the Eternal, the All-Powerful, Who hath encompassed earth and heaven through His exalted Word and hath brought forth man, endowing him with distinction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الباقی الدائم المقتدر الذی احاط الارض و السماء بکلمته العلیا و اظهر الانسان و فضله
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @prayer for governments and rulers, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
